hero.title: Business in Hinglish...<0/>why is invoicing in English?
hero.subtitle: Now create <0>perfect English</0><1/><2>invoices</2> in Hinglish. Made just for creators.

card.voucherBody: ₹500 aapke, bas Sign up ke liye. Hamari taraf se aaj tak ki angrezi confusion ka refund. Pehle 5 signups ko roz.
card.disclaimer:
By tapping Get OTP, you agree to create an account and
Sparkonomy's <0>Terms and <1>Privacy Policy.

threeStep.title: 3 step. No spreadsheets.
threeStep.subtitle: So easy you'll get it on the first try.

items.title: Bolo, type, ya screenshot lo
items.description: WhatsApp message, email, ya brand chat ka screenshot upload karein — ya bas bolein/likhein "invoice banao." Purana invoice duplicate bhi kar sakte hain.

items.title: AI invoice banayega — jaadu
items.description: AI proper format mein invoice banata hai, typo-free. GST/PAN apne aap add. Aap check kar sakte ho, edit kar sakte ho — AI guide karta rahega.

items.title: Follow-ups hum sambhal lenge
items.description: Ab "Hi, payment?" bhejne ki zarurat nahi. Sparkonomy ka AI WhatsApp / email pe polite, professional reminders bhejta hai.

testimonials.title: What creators are saying
testimonials.subtitle: Invoices that get you paid faster — and make you look good doing it.

items.quote: And I have to reach out so many times to get paid in 3 months, and still it hasn't happened 15-20 times! I want you to do my payment reminders
items.name: Food YouTuber

items.quote: I raise invoices once a month mostly. I don't get time… and it delays my payments. I want you help me raise instant invoices in under 5 mins from my phone
items.name: Tech Instagrammer

items.quote: I don't have time to write down and track all payments in Excel and become my own accountant! I want you to track & remind me of my money matters
items.name: Lifestyle Instagrammer

items.title: Proof of Work, automatic.
items.description: Insta, YouTube, ya Reels ke screenshots khud attach ho jayenge. Aapko kuch bhejna nahi padega.

items.title: Hamesha free, 4 invoices.
items.description: Har mahine 4 invoices free — koi card nahi, koi hidden charge nahi.

items.title: Tax calculations, AI karta hai.
items.description: GST ho ya na ho — AI sab calculate kar leta hai. TDS, barter, multi-rate — sab handle.

items.title: CA-ready, year-end report.
items.description: Saara data ek click pe export karein. CA ko bheje, ITR file karein — Excel sheet ki jhanjat nahi.

items.question: How do I sign up?
items.answer: Give your phone number — that's it! After that, share your social handles, answer a couple of easy questions on your billing info, and you'll be sending invoices using Sparkonomy's AI quicker than a collab DM reply!

items.question: How is this AI for creators and its smart payment useful for me?
items.answer: Sparkonomy's AI helps creators run their business like a pro. Share a chat or collab details and a GST-ready invoice is generated in seconds.

items.question: What information do I need to add to my profile to start invoicing?
items.answer: Just share your name, address, PAN and payment details (UPI/Bank account). It takes less than 5 minutes and you only do it once.

items.question: How do I create my first invoice?
items.answer: Sparkonomy's creator AI lets you make an invoice in under 3 minutes with a few taps — all from your phone.

items.question: How will Sparkonomy make payment reminders on my behalf?
items.answer: When you create your invoice, you choose how many reminders to send and how often. We send them on WhatsApp and email.
